name: finetune
title: FineTune
description: Control app volume with optional FineTune routing/boost and a global FineTune on/off toggle
author: tiaippoliti

commands.name: control-volume
commands.title: Control App Volume
commands.description: View and control volume for apps with active audio.

commands.name: toggle-finetune
commands.title: Toggle FineTune
commands.description: Enable or disable FineTune processing. Disabled mode uses only system-default audio routing.

commands.name: set-default-output-device
commands.title: Set Default Output Device (FineTune)
commands.description: Set system default output device quickly.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
